hero.title_part2: Rust base for vertical AI agents with a fast operator path.
hero.description: Start with onboard, ask, chat, and doctor. Then grow into providers, channels, tools, memory, policy, gateway supervision, and rollout playbooks without changing the runtime model.

features.title: Why Loong
features.subtitle: First value fast, governed runtime later, on the same public surface.
features.first_value_desc: Reach one useful result before you are forced to learn the whole architecture.
first_value_details: Repair path stays explicit with doctor
features.truthful_desc: Providers, channels, gateway ownership, and outbound-only delivery are not flattened into one vague support claim.
truthful_details: Runtime-backed and outbound-only lanes stay distinct
Selectors and account boundaries stay visible
features.governed_desc: Tools, memory, approvals, policy, and audit stay inside the real runtime path.
governed_details: Audit and runtime commands are public
features.extend_desc: Loong keeps providers, channels, tools, memory, and policy visible as extension boundaries.
extend_details: Grows from local CLI to governed rollouts

community.title: Community & Ecosystem
community.subtitle: Join our open source community and help advance the Agentic OS
community.letter_title: A Letter from the Loong Team
community.p1: When we started building Loong, our vision was simple: create an Agentic OS that empowers developers to build intelligent, autonomous applications with ease. Today, we're excited to share this journey with you.
community.p2: This project represents countless hours of development, testing, and refinement. But more importantly, it represents our commitment to open source and the belief that the best software is built together, as a community.
community.p3: Whether you're here to contribute code, report bugs, or simply explore what we've built — welcome. Your feedback, ideas, and enthusiasm are what will make Loong truly great.
community.p4: Let's build the future of Agentic OS, together.

architecture.title: 7-Crate Strict DAG Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Clear dependency direction, stable kernel contracts
architecture.hl1: Zero cyclic dependencies - Strict DAG structure
architecture.hl2: Stable kernel contracts - contracts crate with zero internal deps
architecture.hl3: Business logic separated from core - extension planes architecture
architecture.hl4: Capability-gated by default - every operation requires authorization
architecture.crate_role_0: Shared types, capability model. Zero deps

quickstart.title: Get Started in 5 Minutes
quickstart.subtitle: Install, reach a first useful answer, and keep the local runtime healthy.
quickstart.step1_desc: Use the release-first installer or source install with --onboard
quickstart.step2_desc: Use onboard and ask to reach one useful answer quickly
quickstart.step3_desc: Check health, apply safe fixes, and continue with confidence

pathways.title: Choose Your Path
pathways.subtitle: Use the same docs structure as the product: start from the decision you actually need to make.
pathways.local_desc: Start with installation, first run, and doctor when you want one healthy local result fast.
pathways.provider_desc: Read the provider and model contract before going deep into configuration.
pathways.channel_desc: Choose the runtime-backed or outbound lane before you wire channels and recipes.
pathways.gateway_desc: Use gateway pages once one service channel already works and ownership becomes the question.
pathways.skills_title: Unblock managed skills and browser boundaries
pathways.skills_desc: Go here when install policy, browser preview, or domain boundaries are the next blocker.

playbooks.title: Common Setups
playbooks.subtitle: Representative end-to-end rollout shapes that combine providers, channels, and ownership.
playbooks.lark_desc: The primary hosted provider and team-chat lane stay together in one rollout path.
playbooks.wecom_desc: Use the enterprise runtime lane that matches the shipped long-connection contract.
playbooks.telegram_desc: Keep the coding lane and the lightweight bot surface explicit in the same playbook.
playbooks.local_desc: Use local inference while keeping delivery truthful and explicitly outbound-only.
playbooks.gateway_desc: Scale from one healthy service surface to explicit multi-channel gateway ownership.

runtime.title: Operator-Visible Runtime
runtime.subtitle: Loong does not hide the runtime behind one happy-path prompt.
runtime.entrypoints_desc: The shortest supported path is visible and runnable before deeper docs.
runtime.operator_desc: The runtime exposes the commands teams actually need for inspection and control.
runtime.delivery_desc: Longer-lived service control stays explicit instead of hidden behind one assistant story.
runtime.governance_desc: Capabilities that matter in real operations stay on the same runtime model.

docs_nav.title: Docs by Decision
docs_nav.subtitle: Open the page that matches your next decision instead of reading the whole tree.
docs_nav.get_started_desc: The shortest path from install to first useful answer.
docs_nav.setups_desc: Representative rollout playbooks for real provider, channel, and gateway shapes.
docs_nav.providers_desc: Choose the right provider lane and understand model selection before config drift starts.
docs_nav.channels_desc: Understand delivery surfaces, runtime-backed lanes, and channel setup truthfully.
docs_nav.tools_desc: See the governed capability model for tools, memory, and continuity.
docs_nav.gateway_desc: Choose the owner contract for longer-lived service channels and selectors.
docs_nav.build_desc: Use the builder-facing architecture and extension contract when you are ready to extend seams.
docs_nav.reference_desc: Read the product stance, roadmap, reliability, releases, and the deeper why.

community_page.title: Community
community_page.subtitle: Connect with developers, contributors, and evolving agents. Loong is a secure, extensible, and evolvable smart baseline built for teams.

seo.default_title: Loong | Rust base for vertical AI agents
seo.default_description: Loong is a Rust base for vertical AI agents with fast first value, governed runtime capabilities, explicit delivery contracts, and rollout playbooks.
seo.community_description: Connect with the Loong open source community, contributors, and collaboration channels.
seo.changelog_description: Track Loong releases, version notes, and ongoing product updates.
